prompt: Vertical portrait 9:16 high-resolution steampunk fantasy world atlas for an Iron Kingdoms inspired Full Metal Fantasy setting. Terrain type: dual_continent. Two large continents separated by diagonal and S-shaped steam-fog straits, crescent industrial gulfs, naval narrows, shoals, and twisting channels, not a simple vertical split. Brass-and-soot parchment map with mechanikal detail overlay. One continent: mechanikal factory-cities, storm-tech rail provinces, river hubs, warjack assembly ports, arcane foundries, fortified plains. Other continent: frozen fortress nations, theocratic temple-forts, elven arcane enclaves, dwarf mountain holds, blighted marshes, alchemical wastelands, arcane storm fronts. Complex realistic coastlines with peninsulas, bays, gulfs, straits, broken shores, curved coasts, deltas, fjords, capes, lagoons, barrier islands and sea caves. Uneven varied islands: naval fortress isles, foundry islands, warjack docks, arcane lighthouses, smuggler ports. No readable labels, no logos, no modern satellite style.
